title: OpenBlast CSV v1.0
description: Vendor-neutral CSV format for open-pit drill and blast hole data, designed for geotechnical reconciliation workflows. One row per loaded blasthole.

hole_id.description: Unique hole identifier within the dataset. Equivalent to BHID in Datamine/MinePlan, Nombre in ENAEX.

blast_id.description: Identifier of the blast/polygon the hole belongs to. Allows grouping holes for powder factor, vibration and fragmentation analyses.

sequence.description: Initiation sequence row (delay row). Holes in the same blast with the same sequence fire simultaneously.

easting.description: Easting coordinate of the collar (metres). Coordinate Reference System (CRS) declared in datapackage.json. ENAEX: Longitud_Geo. Datamine: XCOLLAR.

northing.description: Northing coordinate of the collar (metres). ENAEX: Latitud_Geo. Datamine: YCOLLAR.

elevation.description: Collar elevation (metres). ENAEX: Z_collar (after +15 m bench offset). Datamine: ZCOLLAR.

dip.description: Hole dip angle in degrees; positive downward, negative upward. ENAEX: Inclinacion_real. Datamine: DIP.

azimuth.description: Hole azimuth in degrees clockwise from North (0=N, 90=E, 180=S, 270=W). ENAEX: Azimuth_real. Datamine: BRG.

hole_length_actual.description: Actual drilled length (metres). ENAEX: longitud_real. Datamine: LENGTH.

diameter_mm.description: Bit diameter in millimetres. ENAEX: diametro (mm) or diametro_pulgada (inches × 25.4).

burden.description: Burden (metres). Distance to the nearest free face at the moment of charging.

spacing.description: Spacing (metres). Distance to the nearest neighbouring hole in the same row.

subdrill.description: Subdrilling / pasadura (metres). Length drilled below the planned toe to ensure the floor breaks cleanly.

explosive_type.description: Main explosive category. ENAEX: Nombre (Pirex-930/920/950/970, Enaline, etc.).

explosive_kg_actual.description: Actual kg of explosive loaded into the hole. ENAEX: Kilos_Cargados_real.

explosive_kg_planned.description: Planned kg of explosive per design (theoretical).

explosive_density_g_cc.description: In-situ explosive density (g/cm³). ANFO ≈ 0.80, emulsions ≈ 1.15-1.25, heavy ANFO ≈ 1.00-1.20.

bulk_kg.description: Kg of bulk-loaded explosive (pumped or augered).

stemming_length_m.description: Stemming (taco) length (metres) at the top of the hole. ENAEX: stemming_real.

mine_site.description: Mine site / pit identifier. ENAEX: Nombre_Rajo (constant within a dataset).

shot_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of detonation with UTC offset. Example: 2026-04-12T13:42:00-03:00. ENAEX: fecha_tronadura.

operator.description: Company or crew that loaded the hole. ENAEX: holes_dateUpdated (indirect).

rock_mass_rating.description: Bieniawski RMR (0-100). Optional; required for Hoek-Brown FS calculation if provided.

density_rock_t_m3.description: In-situ rock density (tonnes/m³). Typical 2.6-2.8 for hard rock. Used to convert PF by mass to PF by volume.

delay_ms.description: Total delay in milliseconds from the blast reference time.

decoupling_ratio.description: Ratio of charge diameter to hole diameter (1.0 = full coupling, <1.0 = decoupled).

comment.description: Free-text comment about this hole (e.g. 'wet hole', 'detonado parcialmente').

anomaly_flag.description: Anomaly classification. Use 'misfire' for unexploded holes, 'cutoff' if detonation stopped mid-hole, etc.
